mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments ( post_id, user_id, parent_comment_id, content ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{content} )
mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS commentId, c.post_id AS postId, c.parent_comment_id AS parentCommentId, u.id AS writerId, u.nickname AS writerNickname, u.profile_image_url AS writerProfileImageUrl, c.content, c.status, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.id = #{commentId}

SELECT c.id AS commentId, c.post_id AS postId, c.parent_comment_id AS parentCommentId, u.id AS writerId, u.nickname AS writerNickname, u.profile_image_url AS writerProfileImageUrl, c.content, c.status, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.parent_comment_id IS NULL THEN c.id ELSE c.parent_comment_id END ASC, c.parent_comment_id IS NOT NULL ASC, c.created_at ASC, c.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET status = 'DELETED' WHERE id = #{commentId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
